session.user:
Run the following command and report results:
``` python -m pytest tests/unit/cli/commands/pr/test_dispatch_cmd.py tests/unit/cli/commands/test_implement.py tests/ -k "plan_workflow" -x --tb=short 2>&1 | head -100 ```
If the above pytest paths don't exist, try: ``` python -m pytest tests/ -k "dispatch or implement or plan_workflow" -x --tb=short 2>&1 | head -100 ```
Report all test results including pass/fail counts and any error messages.
session.assistant: I'll run the pytest command to check the test results. Let me start with the normalized command using `uv run`:

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: uv run pytest tests/unit/cli/commands/pr/test_dispatch_cmd.py tests/unit/cli/commands/test_implement.py tests/ -k "plan_workflow" -x --tb=short 2>&1 | head -100
